ul.li: Zero-Copy: Hardware DMA writes to Packet Data Area. Software adjusts data_off to prepend headers in Headroom.
Cache Locality: kbns_buf_hdr is exactly 64 bytes, ensuring metadata fits in one L1 cache line access.
False Sharing: Per-core caches are padded with 60 bytes to ensure count variables for different cores never sit on the same cache line.
Alignment: memory_layout base is 2MB or 1GB page aligned.
